overview: A full-stack proctored hiring exam platform. Candidates register, receive credentials, and take a timed technical exam under automated monitoring — camera capture, mic noise detection, and tab-switch tracking. Admins configure exams, upload questions via Excel, or generate them using AI. After submission, a detailed scoreboard shows scores, proctoring events, and pass/fail status.
features: Candidate registration with auto-generated password displayed on screen
Secure login with 5-minute lockout after 3 failed attempts
Proctoring: camera frame capture every 10s, mic noise detection, tab-switch auto-submit
Admin exam setup: Excel question upload and Ollama AI question generation
Configurable timed exam with auto-submit on timeout
Detailed scoreboard with per-difficulty breakdown, proctoring flags, and pass/fail indicator
